entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop being evaluated for resistance to weevil infestation

entities.name: SITOPHILUS ZEAMAIS
entities.description: A destructive maize weevil pest that infests maize stored in tropical regions

entities.name: TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: The geographical areas where maize is stored and susceptible to S. zeamais

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of maize genotypes to withstand or limit infestation by S. zeamais

entities.name: MAIZE HYBRIDS
entities.description: Selected maize varieties evaluated for their level of resistance to weevil infestation

entities.name: DUMA 41
entities.description: A maize hybrid used as a susceptible check in the resistance evaluation

entities.name: MTP0701
entities.description: A maize hybrid used as a resistant check in the resistance evaluation

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used to evaluate the maize hybrids

entities.name: MAIZE STORAGE
entities.description: The condition under which the maize hybrids were kept for assessment over 120 days

entities.name: PERCENT WEEVIL DAMAGE
entities.description: A trait measured to assess the extent of infestation by S. zeamais

entities.name: GRAIN WEIGHT LOSS
entities.description: A trait measured to quantify the damage caused by S. zeamais infestation

entities.name: NUMBER OF LIVE AND DEAD WEEVILS
entities.description: A trait measured to determine the population dynamics of the pest

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: A concept used to estimate the proportion of trait variation due to genetic factors

entities.name: CORRELATION
entities.description: A concept used to determine the relationship between weight loss, weevil count, and damage

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine significant differences in weight loss

entities.name: KH631Q
entities.description: A maize hybrid identified as the most resistant to S. zeamais

entities.name: PH4
entities.description: A maize hybrid identified as moderately resistant to S. zeamais

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: The method of developing improved maize varieties using resistant parents

NUMBER OF LIVE AND DEAD WEEVILS
